topic: Tenses Part 3 — Future Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous)

drills.title: Tenses Part 3 — Future Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) — Speaking Set 1

sentences.english: I will eat rice tomorrow.
sentences.hindi: मैं कल चावल खाऊँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: i will eat rice tomorrow

sentences.english: I will be eating food at 8 pm.
sentences.hindi: 8 बजे मैं खाना खा रहा होऊँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: i will be eating food at 8 pm

sentences.english: I will have eaten food by 8 pm.
sentences.hindi: 8 बजे तक मैं खाना खा चुका होऊँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: i will have eaten food by 8 pm

drills.title: Tenses Part 3 — Future Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) — Speaking Set 2

sentences.english: I will have been eating for an hour by 8 pm.
sentences.hindi: 8 बजे तक मैं एक घंटे से खा रहा होऊँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: i will have been eating for an hour by 8 pm

sentences.english: She will go to work tomorrow.
sentences.hindi: वह कल काम पर जाएगी।
sentences.pronunciation: she will go to work tomorrow

sentences.english: She will be working at 5 pm.
sentences.hindi: 5 बजे वह काम कर रही होगी।
sentences.pronunciation: she will be working at 5 pm

drills.title: Tenses Part 3 — Future Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) — Speaking Set 3

sentences.english: She will have finished her work by 5 pm.
sentences.hindi: 5 बजे तक वह काम खत्म कर चुकी होगी।
sentences.pronunciation: she will have finished her work by 5 pm

sentences.english: She will have been working for two hours by 5 pm.
sentences.hindi: 5 बजे तक वह दो घंटे से काम कर रही होगी।
sentences.pronunciation: she will have been working for two hours by 5 pm

sentences.english: They will go to school tomorrow.
sentences.hindi: वे कल स्कूल जाएंगे।
sentences.pronunciation: they will go to school tomorrow

drills.title: Tenses Part 3 — Future Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) — Speaking Set 4

sentences.english: They will be playing at 3 pm.
sentences.hindi: 3 बजे वे खेल रहे होंगे।
sentences.pronunciation: they will be playing at 3 pm

sentences.english: They will have done their homework by 3 pm.
sentences.hindi: 3 बजे तक वे homework कर चुके होंगे।
sentences.pronunciation: they will have done their homework by 3 pm

sentences.english: They will have been playing for an hour by 3 pm.
sentences.hindi: 3 बजे तक वे एक घंटे से खेल रहे होंगे।
sentences.pronunciation: they will have been playing for an hour by 3 pm

drills.title: Tenses Part 3 — Future Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) — Speaking Set 5

sentences.english: I will exercise tomorrow morning.
sentences.hindi: मैं कल सुबह exercise करूँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: i will exercise tomorrow morning

sentences.english: I will be reading at 7 pm.
sentences.hindi: 7 बजे मैं पढ़ रहा होऊँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: i will be reading at 7 pm

sentences.english: I will have read this book by 7 pm.
sentences.hindi: 7 बजे तक मैं यह किताब पढ़ चुका होऊँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: i will have read this book by 7 pm

drills.title: Tenses Part 3 — Future Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) — Speaking Set 6

sentences.english: I will have been reading for three hours by 7 pm.
sentences.hindi: 7 बजे तक मैं तीन घंटे से पढ़ रहा होऊँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: i will have been reading for three hours by 7 pm

sentences.english: He will sing a song next week.
sentences.hindi: वह अगले हफ्ते एक गाना गाएगा।
sentences.pronunciation: he will sing a song next week

sentences.english: He will be singing at 6 pm.
sentences.hindi: 6 बजे वह गा रहा होगा।
sentences.pronunciation: he will be singing at 6 pm

drills.title: Tenses Part 3 — Future Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) — Speaking Set 7

sentences.english: He will have sung the song by 6 pm.
sentences.hindi: 6 बजे तक वह गाना गा चुका होगा।
sentences.pronunciation: he will have sung the song by 6 pm

sentences.english: He will have been singing for half an hour by 6 pm.
sentences.hindi: 6 बजे तक वह आधे घंटे से गा रहा होगा।
sentences.pronunciation: he will have been singing for half an hour by 6 pm
